summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were present, and the job disallows merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout, so all open PRs are retained for maintainer review or author proof rather than mutated.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR for a live canonical issue; keep open for maintainer review because merge/fix actions are disallowed and technical correctness/maintainer signal require human handling.
Draft, broad, proof-incomplete PR. Keep open as related inventory work; no low-signal closeout is allowed, and technical correctness/proof decisions require human or author follow-up.
Maintainer-owned guidance PR with failed proof and stale-surface reconciliation required. Keep open for maintainer handling rather than closing or trying to repair.
Focused bug-fix PR for a real issue, but it is dirty and lacks live behavior proof. Keep open for proof/repair; no fix or merge path is permitted by this job.
Useful narrow contributor PR for a live linked issue, but finalization is outside this job. Keep open for maintainer review and check-state resolution.
